name: NVIDIA
description: Designs GPUs and accelerators for AI training and inference; data-center segment dominates revenue.

name: Apple
description: iPhone hardware franchise plus a growing services segment (App Store, iCloud, advertising).

name: Microsoft
description: Productivity (Office, Teams), cloud (Azure), and an emerging AI platform business.

name: Alphabet
description: Search advertising dominant; YouTube, Google Cloud, and Waymo as growth optionalities.

name: Amazon
description: E-commerce marketplace with AWS as the primary profit engine.

name: Meta Platforms
description: Facebook and Instagram advertising; Reality Labs AR/VR investment offset by ad strength.

name: Tesla
description: Electric vehicles and energy storage; autonomy and robotaxi narrative drives multiple.

name: Netflix
description: Subscription streaming with ad-tier growth and live-event experimentation.

name: Advanced Micro Devices
description: CPUs (Ryzen, EPYC) and GPUs (Instinct) competing in data-center AI workloads.

name: Intel
description: Incumbent CPU maker pivoting to foundry; turnaround under a multi-year capex plan.

name: JPMorgan Chase
description: Universal bank; investment banking, consumer banking, asset management.

name: Bank of America
description: Consumer-deposit franchise; rate-sensitive net interest income.

name: Wells Fargo
description: Consumer and commercial banking emerging from a regulatory asset cap.

name: Goldman Sachs
description: Investment banking, trading, and a growing wealth-management franchise.

name: Johnson & Johnson
description: Diversified pharma; consumer-health spinoff completed.

name: Pfizer
description: Post-COVID revenue normalization; oncology pipeline rebuild.

name: Moderna
description: mRNA platform extending beyond COVID into flu, RSV, and oncology.

name: Coca-Cola
description: Global beverage portfolio; pricing power offsetting volume softness.

name: PepsiCo
description: Beverages plus Frito-Lay snacks; pricing-led growth.

name: McDonald's
description: Global QSR franchise model; value-menu pivot in response to traffic softness.
